data.title: Ford Slides 5% Pre-Market After Disappointing Outlook, High Loss From EV Segment In 2024
data.description: Ford shares are down 5% in premarket trading after the company said that it expects $5 billion to $5.5 billion in losses in its EV segment.

data.title: Peter Thiel-Backed Crypto Exchange Reportedly Plans IPO In 2025 Amid Bitcoin And Digital Currency Boom (CORRECTED)
data.description:
Editor’s Note: This story has been updated to clarify Alan Howard’s holdings in Block.one.



In the wake of a significant upswing in the cryptocurrency market, crypto exchange Bullish Global is reportedly contemplating an initial public offering (IPO) in 2025.

data.title: A P Moller Maersk Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
US Stocks Likely To Open Higher Ahead Of Amazon's Earnings: 'Buy The Dip' Mentality Remains Prevalent, Says Analyst
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Thursday following Wednesday's advances as investors digest tariff pauses amid earnings reports.

data.title: DeepSeek's Hedge Fund Owner Had Multiple Top Projects Before Creating The Firm That Fueled $1 Trillion Market Cap Erosion Of AI Stocks
data.description: Chinese hedge fund High-Flyer is a quantitative fund which was involved with several innovations in China before launching DeepSeek.
